daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of grain measurer in and around Craftspire, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Craftspire workable through the obligations of grain measurer while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Craftspire, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of grain measurer visibly slip.
